productDisplayName: New Hide Men Antique Brown Wallet
description: Crafted from superior quality leather and designed with practicality, this wallet from Newhide makes for a perfect everyday wallet. Open width: 22.5 cm Height: 9.5 cm Made of pure leather with brand name embossed on the outer One zippered compartment and one open compartment Left and right flaps have card holders and compartment on the side Care Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust
